Interface AnalyticsService

All Known Implementing Classes:
AnalyticsServiceImpl
public interface AnalyticsService
Service interface defining all analytics business operations: performance calculations, risk assessments, compliance breach detection and lifecycle.
Version:
2.0
Author:
WealthPro Team

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ComplianceBreachResponseDTO
    acknowledgeBreach(Long breachId)
    Move a breach from OPEN to ACKNOWLEDGED.
    PerformanceRecordResponseDTO
    calculateDailyReturn(Long accountId, Long portfolioId)
    Calculate simulated daily return for an account and persist the record.
    PerformanceRecordResponseDTO
    calculateMonthlyReturn(Long accountId, Long portfolioId)
    Calculate simulated monthly return by aggregating daily returns.
    ComplianceBreachResponseDTO
    closeBreach(Long breachId)
    Move a breach from ACKNOWLEDGED to CLOSED.
    AccountDashboardDTO
    getAccountDashboard(Long accountId)
    Get combined dashboard: performance + risk + open breaches.
    List<ComplianceBreachResponseDTO>
    getBreachesByAccountId(Long accountId)
    Retrieve all compliance breaches for an account.
    List<PerformanceRecordResponseDTO>
    getPerformanceByAccountId(Long accountId)
    Retrieve all performance records for an account.
    List<RiskMeasureResponseDTO>
    getRiskMeasuresByAccountId(Long accountId)
    Retrieve all risk measures for an account.
    List<ComplianceBreachResponseDTO>
    runComplianceScan(Long accountId)
    Run a compliance scan detecting CONCENTRATION, EXPOSURE_LIMIT, and RESTRICTED_SECURITY violations using simulated rules.
    List<RiskMeasureResponseDTO>
    runRiskAssessment(Long accountId)
    Run a full risk assessment — calculates VOLATILITY, MAX_DRAWDOWN, VAR_95, and TRACKING_ERROR using simulated data.

  • Method Details

    • getPerformanceByAccountId

      List<PerformanceRecordResponseDTO> getPerformanceByAccountId(Long accountId)
      Retrieve all performance records for an account.

    • calculateDailyReturn

      PerformanceRecordResponseDTO calculateDailyReturn(Long accountId, Long portfolioId)
      Calculate simulated daily return for an account and persist the record. Uses dummy market data to produce a realistic-looking return percentage.

    • calculateMonthlyReturn

      PerformanceRecordResponseDTO calculateMonthlyReturn(Long accountId, Long portfolioId)
      Calculate simulated monthly return by aggregating daily returns.

    • getRiskMeasuresByAccountId

      List<RiskMeasureResponseDTO> getRiskMeasuresByAccountId(Long accountId)
      Retrieve all risk measures for an account.

    • runRiskAssessment

      List<RiskMeasureResponseDTO> runRiskAssessment(Long accountId)
      Run a full risk assessment — calculates VOLATILITY, MAX_DRAWDOWN, VAR_95, and TRACKING_ERROR using simulated data.

    • getBreachesByAccountId

      List<ComplianceBreachResponseDTO> getBreachesByAccountId(Long accountId)
      Retrieve all compliance breaches for an account.

    • runComplianceScan

      List<ComplianceBreachResponseDTO> runComplianceScan(Long accountId)
      Run a compliance scan detecting CONCENTRATION, EXPOSURE_LIMIT, and RESTRICTED_SECURITY violations using simulated rules.

    • acknowledgeBreach

      ComplianceBreachResponseDTO acknowledgeBreach(Long breachId)
      Move a breach from OPEN to ACKNOWLEDGED.

    • closeBreach

      ComplianceBreachResponseDTO closeBreach(Long breachId)
      Move a breach from ACKNOWLEDGED to CLOSED.

    • getAccountDashboard

      AccountDashboardDTO getAccountDashboard(Long accountId)
      Get combined dashboard: performance + risk + open breaches.
